from __future__ import annotations

import cProfile
import io
import pstats


def python_perf_layer_profiling_benchmarking_profile_claim_without_profile_artifact_negative(work):
    profiler = cProfile.Profile()
    profiler.enable()
    work()
    profiler.disable()
    stream = io.StringIO()
    pstats.Stats(profiler, stream=stream).sort_stats("tottime").print_stats(3)
    return stream.getvalue()
